title: Tactics Simulator
subtitle: HTW Berlin Court · half court · offense & defense
hint: Pick a play and press ▶ Play. Or use ✋ Move to build your own set and draw arrows.
afterSelect: Press ▶ Play to watch, or step through with ◀ ▶.

pickAndRoll.step1: 5 (Post) sets a high ball screen for 1.
pickAndRoll.step2: 1 dribbles off the screen toward the rim; defense gets caught.
pickAndRoll.step3: 5 rolls to the rim; 1 delivers the pocket pass.

driveAndKick.step1: 1 (Driver) attacks the paint off the dribble.
driveAndKick.step2: Defense collapses to stop the drive; the corner opens up.
driveAndKick.step3: Kick-out pass to 2, the 3PT shooter in the corner.

giveAndGo.step2: 1 cuts behind the defender toward the rim.
giveAndGo.step3: Return pass; 1 finishes in the paint.

hornsSet.step1: Both bigs (4 & 5) lift to the elbows: mid-range spots.
hornsSet.step3: 1 dribbles into the set and chooses a side.

backdoorCut.step1: 2 fakes stepping out; the defender follows high.

zone23.step1: Two defenders up top, three across the baseline.
zone23.step2: Ball swings to the wing; the zone shifts over.
zone23.step3: Ball reaches the corner; bottom defender closes out, zone rotates.

zone131.step1: Pressure setup: 1 up top, 3 across the middle, 1 at the rim.
zone131.step2: Ball goes to the wing; top and wing defenders set a trap.

manToMan.step1: Each defender locks onto their matchup.
manToMan.step2: Ball on the wing; help defense sinks toward the paint.
